tagline: Hustle, drive, and survive a fog-soaked New England crime town.
description:
**The Narrows** is a grounded open-world crime drama set on the Massachusetts South Coast in 2026 — weathered brick mills, triple-decker houses, sodium-lit streets, and a working waterfront wrapped in coastal fog.

Walk the neighborhood, meet the locals, and take orders from Sully, the fixer who works the corner outside the diner. Slide behind the wheel of a used sedan and roll through rain-slicked streets toward your next job, then come back to collect your cash.

City hall, the mills, and the guys down the wharf all have a hand out — and the satire is in the signage, the radio, and the people you meet. Explore freely, build your bankroll, and find your angle.
